GCP AI/ML Engineer - Lorven technologies

Evangeline Janet

Recruitment Executive - US Staffing

🚀 We’re Hiring: GCP AI/ML Engineer 🚀
🌍 Location: Remote
📄 Type: Contract 
12+ Experience Candidate 

We’re on the lookout for a GCP AI/ML Engineer who can turn cutting-edge ideas into scalable, production-ready solutions. If you live and breathe machine learning, cloud, and GenAI-this one’s for you!

💡 What You’ll Do:
✨ Design & deploy ML models on Google Cloud
✨ Build GenAI, NLP, and predictive solutions
✨ Work with Vertex AI, BigQuery & Dataflow
✨ Collaborate across data science & engineering teams

🧠 What You Bring:
✔️ 12+ years in tech, 5+ years in AI/ML deployment
✔️ Strong Python & SQL skills
✔️ Hands-on with GCP (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow)
✔️ Experience with TensorFlow / PyTorch / Scikit-learn
✔️ Docker, Kubernetes (GKE), CI/CD know-how

🌟 Bonus Points:
➕ GCP ML Engineer Certification
➕ Vertex AI Agent Builder experience
➕ NLP or Computer Vision background

📩 Apply now or DM me directly! - evangeline@lorventech.com

Role: Principal AI/ML Engineer 
please share me your resume to my E-careers@cogentcube.com

Primary Responsibilities:

Drive end-to-end Machine Learning projects that have a high degree of ambiguity, scale and complexity
Build Machine Learning models, perform proof-of-concept, experiment, optimize, and deploy your models into production; work closely with software engineers to assist in productionizing the ML models
Perform hands-on analysis and modeling of healthcare data sets to develop insights that increase business value
Run A/B experiments, gather data, and perform statistical analysis
Establish scalable, efficient, automated processes for large-scale data analysis, machine-learning model development, model validation and serving
Research and implement innovative machine learning approaches
Mentor and help recruit AI/ML scientists and machine learning engineers to the team

US IT Recruiter | Talent Acquisition | Experience Working with State & Public Sector Clients

🚀 We’re Hiring: Software Engineer — AI-Powered Full-Stack (React + Python)
📍 Location: Remote
📆 Duration: 7 Months Contract
💼 Experience: 3+ Years
We’re looking for a scrappy, builder-minded Software Engineer to develop cutting-edge AI-powered applications. This role is perfect for engineers who thrive in fast-paced environments, love rapid prototyping, and are excited to leverage the latest AI tools to accelerate development.
🔑 Key Responsibilities:
✅ Design, build, and maintain scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, and Python
✅ Leverage AI coding tools (Copilot, Cursor, Claude) to boost development productivity
✅ Rapidly prototype and ship new product ideas (0 → 1 development)
✅ Develop and integrate REST APIs with internal and external systems
✅ Build interactive dashboards using Plotly, D3, or Streamlit
✅ (Bonus) Develop AI-native applications and work with LLM APIs
🎯 Required Skills & Experience:
✅ 3+ years of full-stack development (React/TypeScript + Python)
✅ Hands-on experience using AI-assisted development tools
✅ Strong experience in rapid prototyping and product development
✅ Solid understanding of API design, system integrations, and architecture
✅ Experience with data visualization tools and techniques
✅ Strong proficiency in Python
⭐ Preferred Qualifications:
✔ Experience building AI/LLM-powered applications
✔ Familiarity with agentic frameworks (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, MCP)
✔ Experience with workforce management or operations platforms

👇 Interested or know someone who fits?
Comment “Interested” or send a direct message with your resume to:
📩 catherine.r@vrdella.com
📞 Contact: +1 609-759-9016 / 1944 (EXT)
Drop your resume or DM me to discuss!

#Hiring #SoftwareEngineer #FullStack #ReactJS #Python #AI #LLM #OpenAI #LangChain #TechJobs #DeveloperJobs #AIJobs #HiringNow
